finding_title: Sensitive Data Stored in Cleartext SharedPreferences
description: User account number and PIN stored in cleartext in SharedPreferences accessible to any app on rooted device.
remediation: Encrypt sensitive data using Android Keystore. Never store PIN in local storage.

description: Application does not implement certificate pinning. Traffic interceptable via Burp Suite proxy without any special setup.
remediation: Implement certificate pinning using OkHttp CertificatePinner or TrustKit.

description: Jailbreak detection bypassed using Shadow library. App runs normally on jailbroken device.
remediation: Implement multi-layered jailbreak detection. Use commercial RASP solution.

description: LoginActivity exported without requiring permissions. Can be launched from external apps.
remediation: Add android:exported=false or require permission for sensitive activities.
